default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Transition GrowthX team for NBD account and discuss content strategy updates](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Andrej stepping down; new GrowthX team introduced (Jenn, Dave, Deya)](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Content strategy progressing: 60 clicks, 55 articles published, refreshing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [CTA implementation and traffic source analysis needed for improved lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Addressing minor technical issues (Webflow formatting, site crawling)](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

## Topics

### Team Transition

  - [Andrej stepping down from GrowthX to focus on personal matters](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [New team introduced: Jenn (Managing Editor), Dave (Managing Director), Deya (Writer)](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Roles explained: Jenn as main point of contact, Dave for weekly performance updates](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Kyle to remain involved in background capacity](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)

### Content Strategy Progress

  - [Currently at \~60 clicks, static growth (early stages, \~1 month of publishing)](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [55 articles to be published in total, a few shy of goal](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Refreshing all existing articles based on feedback, ETA Friday afternoon](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Internal linking improved after resolving sitemap issues](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)

### CRO and Lead Generation

  - [Discussed need for in-content CTAs, banners, or widgets to capture leads](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Suggestion to implement different CTAs based on article topics/clusters](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Plan to add CTAs to all published and future articles](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Need to analyze traffic sources (likely organic) and user behavior](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

### Technical Issues

  - [Webflow formatting discrepancy noted (appears differently for Michaela)](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Google Search Console shows normal display; may be local browser issue](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Previous sitemap/indexing issues resolved, helping with internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)

### Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to check Google Analytics access, provide traffic source report](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Implement in-content CTAs for improved lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Investigate and resolve Webflow formatting discrepancy](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Continue refreshing existing content and publishing new articles](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Schedule broader strategic discussion on go-to-market strategy and channel optimization](https://fathom.video/share/84xBYsxDoa8mXV2hKGK7tmsM221XgJMB?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

action_items.description: Brief Bea on meeting outcomes - team transition, roles, in-content CTAs, traffic source analysis
Surface need for in-content CTAs to internal team; initiate strategic discussion
Investigate weird formatting issue in "Cost of Web Design for Tech Companies in 2025" article w/ dev team
Check GrowthX team's access to NBD Google Analytics; request from Bea if needed
Prepare async report on traffic sources once GA access confirmed
